name: api-automation-project
description: Proyecto de automatización de APIs con Postman y Newman

scripts.test:all: newman run collections/UserManagement.postman_collection.json -g environments/ReqRes_Practice.postman_environment.json -r cli,json,htmlextra,junit --reporter-json-export reports/json-report.json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html-report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/junit-report.xml
